creator: olgeni@FreeBSD.org
text:
A few typo fixes for HEAD, for comments and a couple of prints.

Affected files:

  libexec/tftpd/tftp-utils.c
  sys/arm/xscale/ixp425/ixp425_qmgr.c
  sys/boot/arm/ixp425/boot2/ixp425_board.c
  sys/dev/ata/ata-disk.c
  sys/dev/drm/r300_reg.h
  sys/dev/isp/isp_freebsd.c
  sys/dev/ixgbe/ixgbe.c
  sys/dev/msk/if_msk.c
  sys/dev/pccard/pccardvar.h
  sys/dev/sound/sbus/cs4231.c
  sys/dev/syscons/schistory.c
  sys/dev/uart/uart_subr.c
  sys/kern/subr_lock.c
  sys/mips/mips/vm_machdep.c
  sys/netinet/sctp.h
  sys/netinet/sctp_os_bsd.h
  sys/netinet/sctp_pcb.c
  sys/netinet/sctp_uio.h
  sys/security/mac_portacl/mac_portacl.c
  usr.bin/seq/seq.c
  usr.sbin/config/configvers.h
